title: Zelenskyy calls for face-to-face Ukraine war negotiations in letter to Putin
summary_full: Ukrainian president proposes meeting in neutral third country as Trump says both sides have to ‘make compromises’‘You can stop your war’: Zelenskyy’s open letter to Putin – in fullThe Ukrainian president, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, has called for face-to-face negotiations in a public letter addressed directly to the Russian president, Vladimir Putin.The letter, the first Zelenskyy has publicly written directly to Putin since Russia launched its full-scale invasion in 2022, was a sweeping criticism of the Russian leader’s 26 years in power.
